---
title: "ModГЁles Ouverts"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# ModГЁles Ouverts (Open Weights)

## Meta вҖ” Llama

| ModГЁle | ParamГЁtres | Context | Architecture | Licence |
|--------|-----------|---------|--------------|---------|
| Llama 4 Scout | 109B (17B active) | 10M | MoE 16 experts | Llama 4 Community |
| Llama 4 Maverick | 400B (17B active) | 1M | MoE 128 experts | Llama 4 Community |
| Llama 4 Behemoth | ~2T | вҖ” | MoE | Llama 4 Community |
| Llama 3.3 70B | 70B | 128K | Dense | Llama 3.1 Community |
| Llama 3.2 3B/1B | 3B/1B | 128K | Dense | Llama 3.2 Community |

::: callout-warning
## Licence Llama
La licence Llama Community interdit l'usage commercial si le revenu mensuel dГ©passe 700M$. Restriction qui limite l'adoption par les trГЁs grandes entreprises.
:::

## Alibaba вҖ” Qwen

| ModГЁle | ParamГЁtres | Context | Architecture | Licence |
|--------|-----------|---------|--------------|---------|
| Qwen3 235B | 235B (22B active) | 128K | MoE | Apache 2.0 |
| Qwen3 30B | 30B | 128K | Dense | Apache 2.0 |
| Qwen3 14B | 14B | 128K | Dense | Apache 2.0 |
| Qwen3 4B | 4B | 32K | Dense | Apache 2.0 |
| Qwen3 Coder 480B | 480B (35B active) | 256K | MoE | Apache 2.0 |
| Qwen2.5-VL 72B | 72B | 128K | Dense + Vision | Apache 2.0 |

::: callout-tip
## Qwen3 : le champion open source
Qwen3 235B (MoE) rivalise avec GPT-4o sur de nombreux benchmarks. Architecture MoE = inference efficace (22B paramГЁtres actifs). Licence Apache 2.0 = usage commercial sans restriction.
:::

## Zhipu вҖ” GLM

| ModГЁle | ParamГЁtres | Context | Architecture | Licence |
|--------|-----------|---------|--------------|---------|
| GLM-5.2 | ~355B | 128K | MoE | MIT (open) |
| GLM-4.6 | 106B | 128K | Dense | MIT |
| GLM-4-Air | 9B | 128K | Dense | MIT |
| ChatGLM3 6B | 6B | 32K | Dense | MIT |

::: callout-note
## GLM-5.2
GLM-5.2 (Zhipu AI) est un MoE open weights avec licence MIT. Performances compГ©titives avec les modГЁles propriГ©taires sur les tГўches de raisonnement et de code. Disponible sur Hugging Face.
:::

## DeepSeek

| ModГЁle | ParamГЁtres | Context | Architecture | Licence |
|--------|-----------|---------|--------------|---------|
| DeepSeek V3 | 671B (37B active) | 128K | MoE | MIT |
| DeepSeek R1 | 671B (37B active) | 128K | MoE + RL | MIT |
| DeepSeek Coder V2 | 236B (21B active) | 128K | MoE | MIT |
| DeepSeek VL2 | 27B | 128K | Dense + Vision | MIT |

::: callout-tip
## DeepSeek R1 вҖ” Reasoning open source
DeepSeek R1 est le premier modГЁle de raisonnement open weights (RL-trained). Performances proches d'o3 sur AIME et MATH. DГ©tail important: le modГЁle "thinking" est intГ©grГ©, pas besoin d'API spГ©ciale.
:::

## Mistral

| ModГЁle | ParamГЁtres | Context | Architecture | Licence |
|--------|-----------|---------|--------------|---------|
| Mistral Large 2 | 123B | 128K | Dense | Mistral Research |
| Codestral 25.01 | 22B | 256K | Dense | Mistral Non-Commercial |
| Magistral Medium | 22B | 128K | Dense + reasoning | Mistral |
| Mistral Small 3 | 24B | 32K | Dense | Apache 2.0 |
| Mixtral 8x22B | 141B (39B active) | 64K | MoE | Apache 2.0 |

## Google вҖ” Gemma

| ModГЁle | ParamГЁtres | Context | Architecture | Licence |
|--------|-----------|---------|--------------|---------|
| Gemma 3 27B | 27B | 128K | Dense | Gemma |
| Gemma 3 12B | 12B | 128K | Dense | Gemma |
| Gemma 3 4B | 4B | 128K | Dense | Gemma |
| Gemma 3 1B | 1B | 32K | Dense | Gemma |

## Microsoft вҖ” Phi

| ModГЁle | ParamГЁtres | Context | Architecture | Licence |
|--------|-----------|---------|--------------|---------|
| Phi-4 | 14B | 16K | Dense | MIT |
| Phi-4 multimodal | 14B | 128K | Dense + Vision | MIT |
| Phi-3.5 mini | 3.8B | 128K | Dense | MIT |
| Phi-3.5 MoE | 42B (6.6B active) | 128K | MoE | MIT |

## Autres notables

| ModГЁle | ParamГЁtres | Licence | SpГ©cificitГ©s |
|--------|-----------|---------|--------------|
| OLMo 2 32B | 32B | Apache 2.0 | Fully open (data + code + weights) |
| Falcon 3 10B | 10B | TII Falcon LLM | Гүmirats, multilingue |
| Yi 1.5 34B | 34B | Apache 2.0 | Multilingue (CN/EN) |
| Aya 23 35B | 35B | Apache 2.0 | 23 langues |
| StarCoder2 15B | 15B | BigCode Open | Code generation |

## Tableau de comparaison

| ModГЁle | Params (actifs) | Licence | Reasoning | Tool calling | Multimodal | MoE |
|--------|----------------|---------|-----------|-------------|------------|-----|
| Qwen3 235B | 235B (22B) | Apache 2.0 | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вң… |
| GLM-5.2 | 355B (~35B) | MIT | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| DeepSeek V3 | 671B (37B) | MIT | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вң… |
| DeepSeek R1 | 671B (37B) | MIT | вң… (RL) | вң… | вқҢ | вң… |
| Llama 4 Maverick | 400B (17B) | Llama 4 | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| Llama 3.3 70B | 70B | Llama 3.1 | вқҢ | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| Mistral Large 2 | 123B | Research | вқҢ | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| Gemma 3 27B | 27B | Gemma | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |
| Phi-4 | 14B | MIT | вқҢ | вң… | вң… (variant) | вқҢ |

## Outils & frameworks d'inference dГ©couverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_LLM_START -->
### [AutoGPT](https://github.com/Significant-Gravitas/Auto-GPT)
an experimental open-source application showcasing the capabilities of the GPT-4 language model.

вӯҗ 185.6k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `agents`, `ai`, `artificial-intelligence`, `autonomous-agents`, `claude`, `gpt`, `llama-api`

### [ollama](https://github.com/ollama/ollama)
Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models.

вӯҗ 176.6k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `deepseek`, `gemma`, `gemma3`, `glm`, `go`, `golang`, `gpt-oss`, `llama`

### [Awesome ChatGPT Prompts](https://github.com/f/awesome-chatgpt-prompts)
A collection of prompt examples to be used with the ChatGPT model.

вӯҗ 166.1k | `HTML` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `artificial-intelligence`, `awesome-list`, `chatgpt`, `chatgpt-prompts`, `claude`, `gemini`, `gpt`

### [Dify](https://github.com/langgenius/dify)
An open-source LLM app development platform with an intuitive interface that streamlines AI workflows, model management, and production deployment.

вӯҗ 149.6k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent`, `agentic-ai`, `agentic-framework`, `agentic-workflow`, `ai`, `automation`, `claude`, `genai`

### [LangChain](https://github.com/hwchase17/langchain)
the original рҹҗҚ !GitHub Repo stars

вӯҗ 142.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `anthropic`, `chatgpt`, `deepagents`, `enterprise`, `framework`

### [llama.cpp](https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp)
LLM inference in C/C++.

вӯҗ 121.1k | `C++` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ggml`

### [generative-ai-for-beginners](https://github.com/microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners)
21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

вӯҗ 113.3k | `Jupyter Notebook` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `azure`, `chatgpt`, `dall-e`, `generative-ai`, `generativeai`, `gpt`, `language-model`

### [DeepSeek-V3](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3)
First open-sourced GPT-4o level model.

вӯҗ 104.0k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21

### [LLMs-from-scratch](https://github.com/rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch)
Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

вӯҗ 99.5k | `Jupyter Notebook` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `artificial-intelligence`, `attention-mechanism`, `deep-learning`, `finetuning`, `from-scratch`, `generative-ai`, `gpt`

### [DeepSeek-R1](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1)
First-generation reasoning models from DeepSeek.

вӯҗ 92.0k | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21

### [vLLM](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm)
A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs.

вӯҗ 86.8k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `amd`, `blackwell`, `cuda`, `deepseek`, `deepseek-v3`, `gpt`, `gpt-oss`, `inference`

### [OpenDevin](https://github.com/OpenDevin/OpenDevin)
рҹҷҢ OpenHands: AI-Driven Development

вӯҗ 81.5k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent`, `artificial-intelligence`, `chatgpt`, `claude-ai`, `cli`, `developer-tools`, `gpt`, `llm`

### [OpenHands](https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands)
рҹҷҢ OpenHands: Code Less, Make More. (formerly OpenDevin), a platform for software development agents powered by AI !GitHub Repo stars

вӯҗ 81.5k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent`, `artificial-intelligence`, `chatgpt`, `claude-ai`, `cli`, `developer-tools`, `gpt`, `llm`

### [llm-course](https://github.com/mlabonne/llm-course)
Course to get into Large Language Models (LLMs) with roadmaps and Colab notebooks.

вӯҗ 81.1k | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `course`, `large-language-models`, `llm`, `machine-learning`, `roadmap`

### [Prompt-Engineering-Guide](https://github.com/dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide)
рҹҗҷ Guides, papers, lessons, notebooks and resources for prompt engineering, context engineering, RAG, and AI Agents.

вӯҗ 76.8k | `MDX` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent`, `agents`, `ai-agents`, `chatgpt`, `deep-learning`, `generative-ai`, `language-model`, `llms`

### [gpt4free](https://github.com/xtekky/gpt4free)
The official gpt4free repository | various collection of powerful language models | opus 4.6 gpt 5.3 kimi 2.5 deepseek v3.2 gemini 3

вӯҗ 66.5k | `Python` | Licence: GPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `chatbot`, `chatbots`, `chatgpt`, `chatgpt-4`, `chatgpt-api`, `chatgpt-free`, `chatgpt4`, `deepseek`

### [Embedchain](https://github.com/embedchain/embedchain)
Framework to create ChatGPT like bots over your dataset.

вӯҗ 61.4k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `application`, `chatbots`, `chatgpt`, `genai`, `llm`

### [awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh](https://github.com/PlexPt/awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh)
A Chinese collection of prompt examples to be used with the ChatGPT model.

вӯҗ 61.1k | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `chat-gpt`, `chatgpt`, `chatgpt3`, `chatgpt4`, `gpt`

### [TrendRadar](https://github.com/sansan0/TrendRadar)
вӯҗAI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.рҹҺҜ е‘ҠеҲ«дҝЎжҒҜиҝҮиҪҪпјҢдҪ зҡ„ AI иҲҶжғ…зӣ‘жҺ§еҠ©жүӢдёҺзғӯзӮ№зӯӣйҖүе·Ҙе…·пјҒиҒҡеҗҲеӨҡе№іеҸ°зғӯзӮ№ + RSS и®ўйҳ…пјҢж”ҜжҢҒе…ій”®иҜҚзІҫеҮҶзӯӣйҖүгҖӮAI жҷәиғҪзӯӣйҖүж–°й—» + AI зҝ»иҜ‘ + AI еҲҶжһҗз®ҖжҠҘзӣҙжҺЁжүӢжңәпјҢд№ҹж”ҜжҢҒжҺҘе…Ҙ MCP жһ¶жһ„...

вӯҗ 60.7k | `Python` | Licence: GPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `bark`, `data-analysis`, `docker`, `hot-news`, `llm`, `mail`, `mcp`

### [context7](https://github.com/upstash/context7)
Context7 Platform -- Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors

вӯҗ 59.5k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `llm`, `mcp`, `mcp-server`, `vibe-coding`

<!-- TOOLS_LLM_END -->
